titleStmt.title: SII 22.164: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 164. (A.R. No. 164 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJ. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA (I)—48th YEAR (A.D. 1117-18).

summary.p: The introduction begins with the words Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga. The inscription registers a sale of (a quarter vēli and half mā of) wet land with a well and two house sites, twenty kuḻi in extent, belonging to two ex-accountants in the village Iṟaiyānaraiyūr by the sabhā of the place to the temple of Ūruḍaiya-Paramēśvarar, for the requirements of worship to the goddess Tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai-Nambirāṭṭiyār consecreted by Araiyaṉ Ponnambalakkūttan alias Toṉḍaimānār the headman of Arumbākkam adjoining Maṇavil in Maṇaiyiṟ-kōṭṭam a division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam. The cost of the lands amounted to 13 and odd kāśu and 3 kaḻañju of gold of which the former was the cash endowment made by Toṇḍaimānār at the time of consecration and the latter, that made by the madhyastha of the village for the supply of ghee on the day of festival in Kārttigai month every year. The necessity of the sabhā for the sale of land is said to be its obligation to make up the amount of kaḍamai due to the king which had been defalcated by the two accountants, whose property therefore was now confiscated by the order of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamaka
ḷ ṉilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟciṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi minavar ni
laikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉaimaṉnava ririyaluṟṟaḻitarat ti
kkaṉaittun taṉ cakkaranaṭātti virasiṅhāsanattu Ula
kuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya korājakesari paṉmarāṉa
tribhuvaṉa ccakravaṟtikaḷ śrīkulottuṅka coḻadevaṟku yā
ṇṭu 4 10 8Āvatu malāṭāṉa jaṉaṉātavaḷanāṭṭup pāṉūrk
kūṟṟattu brahmadeyam Iṟaiyāṉaraiyūrāṉa śrīcoḻakeraḷac caruppeti maṅkalattu sabhaiyom nilavilaiyāvaṇam
Ūruṭaiyaparameśvaraṟku jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaiyiṟkoṭṭattu maṇavil Arumpākkiḻāṉ Arai
yaṉ poṉnampalakkūttaṉāṉa toṇṭaimānār Eḻun=taruḷuvitta tirup paḷḷiaṟai nampirāṭṭiyārkku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukku
ṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūr Ūrkkaṇakkan Iḷamai veṅkaṭamāṉa paṇṭitap piriyaṉum Iḷamai karumāṇikkamāṉa bhaṭṭappiriya
ṉum Ivviruvarum Itaṉkiḻ yāṇṭu nāṟpattāṟāvatu Ūrkkaṇakkeḻutik kaṭamaippaṭṭuk kaṭamai pokkaṟāte kuṭi Oṭi
ppoṉamaiyil Ikkaṭamai Eṅkaḷukku Iṟukkaveṇṭiṉamaiyil Ik kaṭamaikku celavāka Ivvūr melpiṭākai cempiyaṉmā
teviyil śrīvānavaṉmātevippererikiḻ naṉpār nirnilam Uttamacoḻa vatikku kiḻakku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟut
taṭi Iraṇṭu nilam kālearaimāvum Itil kiṇaṟum Ivvūr nattattu Ivarkaḷ kaṇakkakkāṇi maṉaiyil Eṭuttuniṉ
ṟa Eṭuppum toṭṭamum Akappaṭa vitiviṭaṅkaṉ kolāl Irupatu kuḻiyum Āka Ittaṉaiyum viṟṟukkuṭukkaveṉṟu mahāni
yokam Uṇṭāṉamaiyil Innilamum Ikkiṇaṟum Immaṉaiyum viṟṟuk kuṭuttukkoḷvatāna Emmilicain=ta vilaippo
ruḷk kācu patiṉmuṉṟe nālumā mukkāṇiyum kācu kallāl Okkum pon mukkaḻañcum Āka Ittaṉaiyum koṇṭom
koṇṭa paricāvatu muṉpu Ivarkaḷ Ivvūr maddhyastanārāyaṇaṉ parameśvara ṉukkāka Ūruṭaiparameśvaraṟkku Āṇṭutoṟum tirukkā
ttikaiyi laḷantuvarukiṟa ney tūṇi nāṉāḻiyālk kaṭava poṉ mukkaḻañcum Ittoṇṭaimāṉār Ippirāṭṭiyārkkut tiruvārātaṉai
kkum tiruvamutupaṭikkum nilaṅkoḷḷa varakkāṭṭiṉa kācu patiṉmuṉṟenālu māmukkāṇiyum Āka Ipponnukkum Ikkācukkum I
ṉnilamum Ikkiṇaṟum Immaṉaiyum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom sabhaiyom panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.164 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
